definitions.text:

definitions.text:

definitions.text:

definitions.text: to postpone something until Tuesday

to step back, move back

[lùi] to step backwards; to retreat; to recede; to recoil 
 Lùi hai bước rồi tiến lên ba bước 
 To take two steps backwards before taking three steps forwards; to take two paces backwards before advancing three paces to put off; to postpone 
 Ngày khai giảng lùi lại vài hôm 
 The beginning of term was postponed a few days 
 Cuộc họp lùi sang ngày hôm sau 
 The meeting was put off until the next day to back; to reverse

 To back/reverse a car (tin học) to backspace

 To backspace twice 
 Lùi ngày tháng 
 Xem đề lùi ngày tháng

to postpone, delay, put off; to step back

[lùi lại] to stand back; to go/step backwards; to back; to recede 
 Lùi lại mấy bước 
 To back a few steps; to take a few steps backwards; to recede a few paces 
 Lùi lại càng xa càng tốt 
 Recede as far as you can 
 Cô gái lùi lại tránh đống cứt 
 The girl backed away from the dung-heap 
 Lùi lại! 
 Tên cướp đang chĩa súng vào anh đấy! 
 Keep back! 
 The thief is aiming his gun at you!

 Xe đang lùi lại đấy! 
 Look out! - 
 The car is backing!
